revision.text: Links to Jira issues and queries via interwiki links. * Use {{Jira|key=PROJECT-123}} to link to a specific issue (uses the jira-task interwiki prefix). * Use {{Jira|jql=...}} to link to a Jira filter. When the value is a Jira URL, the view type is detected from the path: ** /timeline → jira-timeline ** /calendar → jira-calendar ** /summary → jira-summary ** /boards → jira-board ** otherwise → jira-jql (plain JQL query) {{#if:{{{key|}}}|[[jira-task:{{{key}}}]]|{{#if:{{#pos:{{{jql|}}}|/timeline}}|[[jira-timeline:{{{jql}}}]]|{{#if:{{#pos:{{{jql|}}}|/calendar}}|[[jira-calendar:{{{jql}}}]]|{{#if:{{#pos:{{{jql|}}}|/summary}}|[[jira-summary:{{{jql}}}]]|{{#if:{{#pos:{{{jql|}}}|/boards}}|[[jira-board:{{{jql}}}]]|[[jira-jql:{{{jql}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}

<noinclude>This template is used to convert the structured macro "contentbylabel".</noinclude>
<includeonly>
{{#ask:{{#if:{{{conditions|}}}|{{{conditions|}}}|[[Category:{{#arraymap:{{{labels|}}}|,|@@|@@|{{!}}{{!}}}}]]}}
|format=ul
|limit=999
}}
</includeonly>

<noinclude> Fallback template preloaded into pages created via CreateFromTemplate when the original Confluence template could not be resolved. Sets the "Created by macro" property so the page appears in the correct macro instance's listing.
Parameters: * $1 - The macro-id of the CreateFromTemplate instance that created this page </noinclude><includeonly>{{#set: Created by macro=$1 }}</includeonly>

<noinclude>Template for macro "space-details"
</noinclude><includeonly>{| class="wikitable" style="width:{{{width}}}"
|-
| Name || {{NAMESPACE}}
|-
| Description || {{#ask:[[{{NAMESPACE}}:+]][[Space description::+]]|?Space description=|mainlabel=-|link=none}}
|-
| Pages in namespace || {{#ask:[[{{NAMESPACE}}:+]]|format=count}}
|-
| Last page edit || {{#ask:[[{{NAMESPACE}}:+]]|limit=1|sort=Modification date|order=desc|searchlabel=}} 
|-
| Last modification date || {{#ask:[[{{NAMESPACE}}:+]]|?Modification date=|limit=1|sort=Modification date|order=desc|searchlabel=|mainlabel=-}} 
|-
| Last modifier || {{#ask:[[{{NAMESPACE}}:+]]|?Last editor is=|limit=1|sort=Modification date|order=desc|searchlabel=|mainlabel=-}} 
|}</includeonly>

<noinclude> Renders an inputbox for creating new pages from a template and lists pages previously created by this macro instance.
Parameters: * preload - The template page to preload when creating a new page * buttonlabel - Label for the create button * macroid - Unique identifier for this macro instance (used to scope created pages) </noinclude><includeonly> {{#tag:inputbox| type=create preload={{{preload|preload}}} preloadparams[]={{{macroid|}}} buttonlabel={{{buttonlabel|Create from template}}} width=28 break=no useve=true }} {{#ask: [[Created by macro::{{{macroid|}}}]] | format=embedded | sort=Creation date | order=desc | limit=5 | searchlabel=More }} </includeonly>

== '''Meeting Title''' == ''Example: Marketing Weekly Sync'' '''Date:'''
'''Time:'''
'''Location:'''
'''Facilitator:'''
'''Note Taker:'''
'''Attendees:'''
'''Absentees:''' ----- == '''Agenda''' == {| class="wikitable" layout="default" ac:local-id="4fd9cf6b-4c9d-408a-90c4-a58489e3a7e4" data-table-width="1800" |- ac:local-id="7f8f3409-b7fb-4e16-9a2c-f5ec0aa32894" ! ac:local-id="cdef3283-5ce0-4adf-a8fc-1e91c592161e"| # ! ac:local-id="4ab825c8-9ee2-4ce3-98fe-fc4fa70da843"| Topic ! ac:local-id="07221caf-dfe3-4157-acf5-c2a9a1ad2f1d"| Presenter ! ac:local-id="c682bb38-3798-4a77-9c46-f813a07bd1e7"| Time |- ac:local-id="803d509a-5570-457e-ac88-676cf46ef98b" | ac:local-id="f0e7b073-11e9-44ca-8108-1f9237225222"| 1 | ac:local-id="b5c25d47-a887-46fc-b903-6c40042ecf01"| | ac:local-id="77988e7d-3b20-4a7c-ba48-60bf9d90f7e9"| | ac:local-id="a83493ea-1d8d-442b-b43e-4dfb718e50ca"| |- ac:local-id="a952811e-4e07-4a52-9e92-de5c415b4d56" | ac:local-id="241dbea1-71d1-4a05-9545-22d5bf2f6b46"| 2 | ac:local-id="09931448-3dc4-4686-a70c-3aea76eda925"| | ac:local-id="4b9507a8-04ff-4f15-8a0e-aa0232afa9bf"| | ac:local-id="5de29089-3bac-4b94-9888-cfb265ec6a44"| |- ac:local-id="364ae3c1-6323-4f78-9d22-ae92037a8ccc" | ac:local-id="009c067f-eb75-483c-93b0-38e85afd528f"| 3 | ac:local-id="469f87af-dbc3-428c-a837-31a091fb7917"| | ac:local-id="138d13bd-fff1-4b26-b5ef-9290f4c31c7b"| | ac:local-id="ae278c90-8bd2-4f26-b4e1-64cd171ea2fa"| |- ac:local-id="26064d39-592c-4e88-bdf7-26dbb86e1d22" | ac:local-id="13bb35e7-bbf0-42dd-8d10-6c694cb63900"| 4 | ac:local-id="831a9780-db54-4f61-aefc-2995635abfbe"| | ac:local-id="13fd279b-c636-43e4-b3ee-8127abad7308"| | ac:local-id="93606bc0-9673-4bc7-ad48-d2d85e009f0d"| |} ----- == '''Discussion Notes''' == === '''1. Topic 1''' === * Key points: * Decisions: * Questions / follow-up: === '''2. Topic 2''' === * Key points: * Decisions: * Questions / follow-up: === '''3. Topic 3''' === * Key points: * Decisions: * Questions / follow-up: ----- == '''Action Items''' == {| class="wikitable" layout="default" ac:local-id="58b17aa0-04b4-4a2d-b2f6-1b0b852b1d6b" data-table-width="1800" |- ac:local-id="3ede40b0-f8b5-4ab4-bf79-995fdd4ba7fc" ! ac:local-id="5338e5c5-42fe-4274-bfa8-45a59840941a"| Action Item ! ac:local-id="ac7f5121-1200-495e-bea5-d028c5b1db95"| Owner ! ac:local-id="b10b9e27-4d12-4db1-8711-e37eb9e16a01"| Due Date ! ac:local-id="f2f27868-11f3-4742-b30c-7be2ac560e9a"| Status |- ac:local-id="35d59bc3-b157-4bb7-ace7-0ec8c4c2c271" | ac:local-id="fc8a35e4-e03f-4de3-b889-f2c20e58e5e2"| | ac:local-id="e1d9e8a7-01a2-4089-86e6-30c2c3941a17"| | ac:local-id="73e17aff-a542-4073-8cba-b44d3e5ea597"| | ac:local-id="11af4a2b-f700-455f-88e3-b06c18baa5c9"| Open |- ac:local-id="b54b0c0a-1302-49d3-88e3-799aab28ac3d" | ac:local-id="05a68aad-7201-4b54-b4cc-831456ff8aab"| | ac:local-id="5483b9df-a365-4eaa-8c98-323766888f1d"| | ac:local-id="de3a7388-c3a0-40aa-aace-22b0ed15334f"| | ac:local-id="1a92cee6-1a07-476a-b87f-312409c7cf7b"| In Progress |- ac:local-id="ccbd99e2-ad26-4d1c-aa2a-2fff6a594f3a" | ac:local-id="5177de8e-40bd-4d22-8e88-b782d109ec83"| | ac:local-id="8c3a21dc-ecd5-4506-a437-b49825e5140e"| | ac:local-id="592ced2e-8dba-4142-a9b5-7885ac2a6b28"| | ac:local-id="3d2850e5-3417-40d6-a7ab-db021cd15dc3"| Done |} ----- == '''Decisions''' == {| class="wikitable" layout="default" ac:local-id="50d6687a-41a1-444b-8374-e2c9755b115f" data-table-width="1800" |- ac:local-id="92289b94-9e3d-4641-936d-b4698efc0f71" ! ac:local-id="b6e05ce2-9833-4029-b964-0ff355642530"| Decision ! ac:local-id="22637197-5d42-4535-9dd6-93adaad9bf2f"| Owner ! ac:local-id="4fd46828-e98c-402c-8868-5f05de1491da"| Date |- ac:local-id="237bc5c4-577a-4324-a141-e1934157868d" | ac:local-id="899dfdcd-a4ec-48e7-ba68-e65d30f982c7"| | ac:local-id="786d04b6-bf1f-4c98-8b1f-1bb5e51dee7d"| | ac:local-id="a7f26b41-4db9-4e47-9018-5601af3d7579"| |- ac:local-id="1646e538-77cd-43db-b792-9a4550023037" | ac:local-id="cc1c7327-6c71-4ab4-841c-a637a578250a"| | ac:local-id="fcaba8b4-94cc-47a3-96d5-8e5c2ed763a1"| | ac:local-id="fce78171-6ae0-4092-85c9-f7a48e879179"| |} {{#set: Created by macro=$1 }}

== Launch Planned ==
[] Confirm launch scope with Product
[] Confirm target release date
[] Gather initial product details
[] Identify key stakeholders
[] Create internal launch folder for planning and assets
== Define Goals and Messaging ==
[] Define launch objectives (awareness, adoption, leads, retention)
[] Identify primary and secondary audiences
[] Draft value proposition
[] Create messaging pillars
[] Validate messaging with Product and Leadership
[] Finalize messaging brief
== Create Launch Plan ==
[] Build launch timeline with milestones
[] Identify required content (blog, email, social, website)
[] Identify required assets (graphics, screenshots, visuals)
[] Define channels and distribution strategy
[] Assign responsibilities within Marketing
[] Identify dependencies (design, product info, approvals)
[] Share plan with stakeholders
== Coordinate with Internal Teams ==
[] Align with Product on feature accuracy
[] Align with Sales on enablement needs
[] Align with Customer Success on customer communication
[] Confirm design resource availability
[] Update plan based on feedback
[] Finalize internal alignment
== Create Launch Content ==
[] Draft blog post or announcement
[] Draft email campaigns
[] Draft social media posts
[] Draft website copy updates
[] Review content internally
[] Apply revisions
[] Finalize all written content
== Prepare Launch Assets ==
[] Request required visuals from Design
[] Provide messaging and content to Design
[] Review draft visuals
[] Request revisions if needed
[] Approve final assets
[] Prepare files for publishing (correct formats, sizes)
== Publish Launch Communications ==
[] Publish blog post
[] Send email campaigns
[] Post on social channels
[] Update website pages
[] Notify internal teams that launch is live
== Monitor Performance and Report ==
[] Track KPIs (traffic, engagement, conversions, adoption)
[] Monitor customer feedback
[] Review campaign performance
[] Document insights and lessons learned
[] Share post-launch report with stakeholders
{{#set: Created by macro=$1 }}
